chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-644 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. For hearing of main case 09-10-2025 Mr. Ihsan Ali Lund Baloch, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. **** Learned AAG pointed out that this Court has already decided matters relating to fresh recruitment made in the police department, whereby directions have been issued to the respondents-department to conduct written tests and interviews afresh departmentally. After such, counsel for the petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant petition, which is accordingly disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
